probe: P70 Wave-0 Deribit subaccount + txn-log probe
provenance: widened deribit_ground_truth harness, run per-key on the Railway worker (Amsterdam), 3 read-only LTP keys. Sanitized: aggregate counts + A1/A2/A3 findings only; no raw rows, balances, ids, or emails.

answers.A1_index_price_on_settlement: POSITIVE — acct3: 218/218 settlement rows carry index_price (0 carry mark_price). Inverse coin->USD conversion uses the settlement row's own event-time index_price (D-07/D-08 valid).
answers.A2_subaccount_reach_readonly: POSITIVE — all 3 keys: get_subaccounts count=2, sees_any=true; subaccount_id loop returns history for read-only keys. (Fixed a harness bug: Deribit returns subaccount id as a STRING; int-only filter had dropped them.)
answers.A3_cashflow_location: trade rows carry ZERO cashflow (inverse/option/unknown cashflow_nonzero=0). Realized cashflow lives ONLY in settlement + delivery rows. On Deribit, perpetual funding is realized INSIDE the settlement session-PnL cashflow — likely NO separate funding stream (reshapes plan 70-04).

history_completeness_all_scopes.note: trades-endpoint = get_user_trades_by_currency_and_time (all scopes incl subaccounts); txnlog_type_trade = transaction-log type=trade rows (the dailies-realized-adjacent stream). Known totals are the founder-provided figures under reconciliation.

history_span: Multi-year, NOT a retention window. acct3 txn-log spans 2023-06 (deposits) .. 2026-06. Full history is returned; the event counts are simply far below the known totals.
BLOCKING_FINDING: Neither the trades endpoint nor the txn-log type=trade count reconciles to the known totals (18,778/21,014/61,248) for ANY account, even with subaccounts — and the counts are INVERSELY correlated with the known totals (acct3 has the highest known total but the fewest txn-log trade rows). The D-02 count gate cannot use these as an honesty anchor. The known totals appear to count a different unit (likely individual fills/legs) than the API surfaces. Daily returns for a derivatives track record derive from realized PnL (settlement+delivery cashflow, funding-inclusive) NOT fill counts — so the count gate may be anchored on the wrong measure. Needs founder input before implementation waves proceed.
